from supabase import create_client
import os

supabase = create_client\(os.getenv\('VITE_SUPABASE_URL'\), os.getenv\('SUPABASE_KEY'\)\)

# collocations 테이블 구조 확인
result = supabase.table\('collocations'\).select\('*'\).limit\(1\).execute\(\)
print\("✅ Collocations 테이블 컬럼:"\)
if result.data:
    print\(f"컬럼: {list\(result.data[0].keys\(\)\)}"\)
else:
    print\("\(비어있음\)"\)

# shadowing_sentences 테이블 구조 확인
result = supabase.table\('shadowing_sentences'\).select\('*'\).limit\(1\).execute\(\)
print\("\\n✅ Shadowing Sentences 테이블 컬럼:"\)
if result.data:
    print\(f"컬럼: {list\(result.data[0].keys\(\)\)}"\)
else:
    print\("\(비어있음\)"\)
EOF)
